title: hyoscyamus pusillus
intro: Hyoscyamus pusillus, also known as small henbane or dwarf henbane, is a poisonous plant species belonging to the nightshade family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, antispasmodic, and anticholinergic effects. The health benefits of Hyoscyamus pusillus include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of Parkinson's disease and other neurological disorders. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal remedies, although it should be handled with caution due to its toxicity.
